_meta.description: [&] Ampersand Box Design — 12 Core Products Topology

nodes.label: [&] Ampersand Box Design
nodes.description: Parent entity for the [&] AI agent infrastructure portfolio. Solo-founded. All 12 products share Elixir/OTP foundation and MCP-native architecture. One system, not twelve products.

nodes.label: Graphonomous
nodes.description: Continual learning engine for AI agents. SQLite-backed knowledge graph with outcome-based confidence updating (learn_from_outcome), GoalGraph orchestration, automatic consolidation (decay, prune, merge). MCP server over stdio. The only shipped product in the portfolio. The only shipped product anywhere combining persistent knowledge graph + feedback-driven learning loop. v0.1.9 on npm.

nodes.label: Deliberatic
nodes.description: Decision-making and argumentation layer. Multi-agent consensus via wBAF graded semantics and BFT commit. Constitutional guardrails with hard boundaries and soft preferences. Paired with Graphonomous as the cognitive core — Graphonomous is what agents know, Deliberatic is how agents decide.

nodes.label: OpenSentience
nodes.description: Local-first agent runtime and operating system. Agent lifecycle, permissions, tool routing, MCP connections. The foundational execution layer all other products run on.

nodes.label: FleetPrompt
nodes.description: Agent skills marketplace and component registry. Package and distribute continual learning strategies as skills. Discover, install, distribute agent skills. 15-30% take rate. Distribution layer for the ecosystem. Tracks which agents support Graphonomous continual learning.

nodes.label: Delegatic
nodes.description: Governance and orchestration layer. Org hierarchy, policy inheritance, authority delegation. Top of the [&] stack — every other product operates within boundaries it defines. Multi-agent team composition from the FleetPrompt registry.

nodes.label: SpecPrompt
nodes.description: Spec-driven development platform. Every published agent includes a validated SPEC.md. Browse specs, fork templates, discover agents by specification. Standards and quality layer.

nodes.label: Agentelic
nodes.description: Agent collaboration platform. Telespaces, rooms, and agent team communication. Also the parent platform brand. Build and test agents in Agentelic Studio, publish directly to FleetPrompt.

nodes.label: AgentRomatic
nodes.description: No-code AI automation platform. Automatic deliberation, consensus, self-organization. The Zapier for AI agents — visual workflow building with agent-powered execution. Inherits Delegatic governance policies.

nodes.label: WebHost Systems
nodes.description: Managed hosting infrastructure. Multi-tenant, global edge deployment. Managed hosting and multi-tenant deployment for the entire [&] stack.

nodes.label: GeoFleetic
nodes.description: Geo-distributed fleet intelligence. Spatial intelligence layer for the [&] stack. AI-powered fleet management with PostGIS/spatial reasoning. Graph-native geospatial orchestration for logistics, naval, and coordinate-heavy domains.

nodes.label: TickTickClock
nodes.description: Time-series continual learning. Detect patterns, predict drift, trigger consolidation. The temporal intelligence layer for the [&] stack.

nodes.label: BendScript
nodes.description: Cloud-based workflow scripting IDE. The unified control plane where users manage their entire AI infrastructure. Visual agent builder, workflow designer, cloud IDE on top of the full stack.

edges.description: Governance policies constrain what specs can declare
Agent teams operate within Delegatic authority boundaries
Automated workflows inherit Delegatic org policies
Marketplace listings respect Delegatic permission model
Every agent on FleetPrompt must have a validated SPEC.md
Agent capabilities defined by SpecPrompt specifications
Agents built in Agentelic Studio publish to FleetPrompt
AgentRomatic workflows compose skills from FleetPrompt
Agents from FleetPrompt install into OpenSentience runtime
FleetPrompt tracks which agents support continual learning
Graphonomous MCP server runs within OpenSentience runtime
Knowledge graph is what Deliberatic reasons over
Argumentation operates on Graphonomous knowledge
OpenSentience runtime deploys on WebHost Systems
TickTickClock detects temporal patterns and triggers Graphonomous consolidation cycles
TickTickClock tracks agent performance and drift over time
GeoFleetic adds spatial graph capabilities to Graphonomous knowledge
GeoFleetic fleet agents run within OpenSentience runtime
GeoFleetic spatial skills distributed as FleetPrompt packages
BendScript IDE provides editing surface for AgentRomatic workflows
BendScript is the visual interface for Delegatic org management
BendScript queries Graphonomous for contextual suggestions
WebHost deployments automated by AgentRomatic workflows

stack_layers.role: Continual learning engine — agents improve over time
Time-series patterns, drift detection, consolidation triggers
Cloud IDE and workflow scripting control plane
Agent skill marketplace and component registry
Agent capability contracts and acceptance criteria
Org hierarchy, policy inheritance, authority delegation

goals.title: Get Graphonomous to 100+ active MCP users
goals.description: The single most important near-term goal. Traction transforms Graphonomous from a technical asset into a fundable startup.
goals.success_criteria: 100+ weekly active MCP connections, 10+ GitHub stars, listed on PulseMCP

goals.title: Dogfood Graphonomous on the full [&] portfolio
goals.description: Use Graphonomous itself to map, track, and learn from the [&] ecosystem. This topology file is step one.
goals.success_criteria: All 12 products mapped as nodes. All dependencies as edges. GoalGraph tracking build progress. learn_from_outcome capturing what works.

goals.title: Build graphonomous ingest CLI for repo-to-graph
goals.description: Automatic codebase ingestion. Walk a repo, create nodes for files/modules/functions, link by import/call relationships.
goals.success_criteria: npx graphonomous ingest ./my-repo creates a navigable graph

goals.title: Build Deliberatic prototype that reasons over Graphonomous
goals.description: Once Graphonomous has the portfolio mapped, build a minimal Deliberatic that answers 'what should I build next?' by reasoning over the graph.
goals.success_criteria: Deliberatic MCP tool that queries Graphonomous and returns a prioritized recommendation

goals.title: Generate first $1 of revenue from any [&] product
goals.description: First dollar proves the ecosystem can monetize.
